Subject: Running a cleaning company in Fort Myers — 2-minute ask
Body:
Hi Liliana,

I know your inbox is full, so I'll keep this short.

I'm Chris Kendig with Clean Scheduler. We're building scheduling software specifically for residential and commercial cleaning companies — crew schedules, quotes, payments, the day-to-day stuff that usually lives in texts, spreadsheets, and sticky notes. I'm reaching out to owner-operated shops in Fort Myers and Lee County because I want real feedback from people who actually run the routes, not a focus group.

Reviews call out your team by name on rental turnovers and office cleans — coordinating those job types is exactly the day-to-day I'm trying to understand.

Would you be open to trying Clean Scheduler for a short stretch and telling me what works and what doesn't? No pitch deck, no hard sell — just your honest take. If after that you decide to stick with it, I'll lock in 10% off your subscription for life on any plan. That offer is my way of saying thank you for the time and the feedback.

If now's a bad time, a one-line "not interested" is totally fine. If you're curious, reply to this email or call/text me at (630) 335-7492 and I'll get you set up.
